cmd_tenant_delete: Delete a tenant and all its data.
cmd_doc_delete: Delete a document and its items/associations.
cmd_import_csv: Import items from a CSV file.
help_import_profile: CSV format override: auto (default; auto-detect), custom, opensalt, or simple
cmd_import_case: Import a CASE CFPackage from a URL (--url) or a local JSON file (--file).
cmd_export_xlsx: Export a document to an OpenSALT-format Excel (.xlsx) workbook.
cmd_export_case: Export a document as a CASE v1.1 CFPackage JSON file.
help_tenant_id: Tenant UUID to assign (optional). When omitted, a fresh UUID v4 is generated. Use this to pin a stable tenant URL across re-creates (e.g., in seed scripts).
err_tenant_id_in_use: Tenant UUID '{value}' is already in use
help_tenant_slug: Optional URL-friendly alias used in public URLs. Must be 2-64 chars of lowercase a-z, 0-9, or hyphens; must start and end with an alphanumeric character; must not look like a UUID; must not be a reserved token (e.g., 'health', 'static'). Example: 'ikenohata-u'.
help_tenant_clear_slug: Remove the tenant's slug (revert to UUID-only URLs).
err_tenant_slug_in_use: Tenant slug '{value}' is already in use
err_slug_uuid_shaped: Slug '{value}' looks like a UUID; use a non-UUID alias
err_slug_reserved: Slug '{value}' is reserved (conflicts with a top-level route)
err_slug_invalid_format: Slug '{value}' is invalid: must be 2-64 chars of lowercase a-z, 0-9, or hyphens, starting and ending with an alphanumeric character
help_xlsx_file: Path to an OpenSALT-format Excel (.xlsx) workbook
help_case_url: CASE API URL or CFPackage URL
help_case_file: Path to a local CFPackage JSON file (exported from OpenCASE / OpenSALT / any CASE-conformant tool)
err_update_requires_option: At least one of --name, --private, or --public is required
err_csv_not_utf8: CSV file is not valid UTF-8
err_invalid_profile: Invalid profile: '{value}'. Valid values: custom, opensalt
err_opensalt_not_supported: opensalt format is not yet supported
cmd_import_rubric: Import rubrics from a CSV file.
prompt_delete_tenant: Delete tenant '{name}' ({id})? This will delete all documents and items. [y/N]
